character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: Was on deck alone when the ship arrived, confessed to Silver's escape and theft of treasure, later spent his money and returned begging.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Escaped with the maroon in a shore boat, stole treasure from the ship, and disappeared.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Retired from the sea after the events, survived the voyage.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Saved his money, studied his profession, became a shipmate and part owner, married, and has a family.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Blandly
character_dossiers.biography: Had plans to fit out his consort ship when the HISPANIOLA returned.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Flint
character_dossiers.biography: A one-legged pirate who buried treasure, referenced in the narrator's nightmares.

character_dossiers.name: the old Negress
character_dossiers.biography: Associated with Silver's disappearance, possibly his companion.
